Simply mouse over the colored hour-tiles and glance at the hours selected by the column... and done! EDT stands for Eastern Daylight Time. UTC is known as Universal Time. UTC is 4 hours ahead of EDT. evidences.title: EST to UTC - Online Converter
evidences.content: Converter supports daylight saving time (DST) or summer time, if the target location is currently using DST time zone, converter will automatically calculate and display local summer time. [...] Based International Air Transport Association (IATA) timezone codes. Time zones use hours and minutes offset from Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), most a whole number of hours, a few are offset by 30 or 45 minutes. Eastern Standard Time (EST) is UTC-5:00, and Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) is UTC-4:00, this time zone is called Eastern Time Zone (ET) in the United States, parts of eastern Canada, Mexico, Panama and the Caribbean Islands. Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) is the primary time standard now, time zones around the world are expressed using offsets from UTC, UTC offset is the difference in hours and minutes from UTC, a time zone can be determined by adding or subtracting the number of UTC offset. evidences.title: Free Crypto Data Terminal + AI Crypto Trading Bot | CryptOn Forecast
evidences.content: Avg Rate ·· Avg APR ·· Consensus ·· Funding Rate Analysis Analyzing funding rate patterns across BTC, ETH, and SOL... How Funding Works Funding rates are periodic payments between long and short traders on perpetual futures. Positive rate = longs pay shorts (bullish crowding). Negative rate = shorts pay longs (bearish crowding). Extreme rates historically predict mean-reversion moves within 24-48 hours. Data: Binance Futures Funding Rate API | Updates every 5 minutes · Countdown resets every 8 hours (00:00, 08:00, 16:00 UTC) ## BTC Price vs Long/Short Ratio When most traders go long, the market often reverses. Track how crowd positioning lines up with BTC price action. ### BTC/USDT · 30 Day Overview Live BTC Price Long Ratio Short Ratio [...] How To Read CVD CVD tracks the net difference between aggressive buy vs sell volume. When Spot CVD rises but price falls, smart money is accumulating. When Futures CVD diverges from Spot, it often signals leveraged speculation vs real demand. Watch for Spot/Futures divergence as a powerful reversal signal. How CryptOn Uses CVD Our AI bot monitors CVD divergence between Spot and Futures in real-time as one of its 16+ indicators. Includes a manual News Window toggle so you can mark high‑impact event periods (CPI, FOMC, NFP, etc.), aligning tape‑based urgency with scheduled catalysts. \\How To Use\\ Look to join moves when fresh time‑pressure labels print into session opens, breakouts, or key levels, rather than fading them. Tune the three main inputs per market and timeframe: lower thresholds for choppy or thin markets, and higher body/volume requirements for very liquid symbols like major indices or BTC pairs.
